message:
Always pass --description to skip interactive editor

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Always pass --description to skip interactive editor
+type: change
+author: mavam
+component: changelog
+created: 2025-12-05T06:10:00Z
+---
+
+The skill now instructs Claude to always pass `--description` when
+adding entries to avoid launching an interactive editor.

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "changelog",
-  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "version": "0.1.1",
   "description": "Manage changelogs and release notes with tenzir-changelog",
   "author": {
     "name": "Tenzir",

@@ -86,9 +86,14 @@ changelog/
 ### Add an Entry
 
 ```bash
-uvx tenzir-changelog add --title "Add feature X" --type feature --author "Name" --pr 123
+uvx tenzir-changelog add \
+  --title "Add feature X" \
+  --type feature \
+  --description "The body explains what changed and why it matters."
 ```
 
+Always pass `--description` to skip the interactive editor. Add `--component`, `--author`, and `--pr` as needed.
+

 ```bash
